body.title: Worker instance identity: personality (class, in-prompt) vs address (instance_name = abbrev.number, shim-leased)
body.text:
CAPTURED 2026-07-02 (live design session, downstream of T-codebuilder-compose-ds which surfaced agent_id='dicksimnel' — a CLASS id where an INSTANCE address belongs; 'address instances, never classes'). Splits worker identity into two layers.

PERSONALITY (class-level, lives in the shared base prompt): who 'DickSimnel / Dick Simnel' IS — full name, character, aliases. Identical for every DS instance; it does not vary by instance and is NOT a device field — it is prompt content the device class carries. (Akien: 'who that is is in the basic whatever prompting for all DS devices — that's the personality.')

ADDRESS (instance-level): instance_name = f'{instance_abbreviation}.{instance_number}' -> 'DS.0'. instance_abbreviation is a class attr ('DS'); instance_number is LEASED from the shim (see D-shim-frontdoor-on-groundloop) — REUSABLE (freed on teardown, reallocated), with 0 a SPECIAL case: the foreground / primary instance. The instance asks the shim for its number during __init__.

agent_id BECOMES self.instance_name — unifying the alarms/escalation id with the routing id. Today they diverge: agent_id='dicksimnel' (a class/device id, flows into the escalation walk + system_alarm caller + logs) vs Granny's routing key 'DickSimnel.0'. One instance identity everywhere.

RECONCILIATION with existing identities (no forced rename): instance_name 'DS.0' is canonical for agent_id. Granny's existing 'DickSimnel.0' resolves as an ALIAS — no forced granny.yaml name migration. DEVICE_ID 'dicksimnel' stays the class/device id. 'DS' + 'DickSimnel' + 'Dick Simnel' are aliases over the one address.

SEQUENCING: the identity FIELDS + agent_id=self.instance_name are buildable NOW with instance_number defaulting to 0 (foreground) — a small independent win, ships before the shim front-door. The reusable-number LEASING depends on the shim front-door (D-shim-frontdoor-on-groundloop) and lands with it (downstream ticket T-shim-lease-instance-numbers, enumerated there).

OPEN: where exactly the personality prompt lives (the coding domain's system prompt vs a dedicated personality layer) — resolve when a second capability/personality split gives it a consumer; do not build a speculative personality layer now.

## Hypothesis
After this lands, agent_id / alarms / escalation (and eventually routing) all read ONE instance identity; adding an instance costs a leased number, not a new id scheme. DS.0's alarm/escalation records read 'DS.0', not 'dicksimnel'.

## Intention
I intend that a worker addresses itself by its instance identity (instance_name), never by its class/device id — so alarms, escalation, and routing all name the same instance.

RELATES TO: D-agent-capability-mixins-over-domains-2026-07-02 (the agent_id hardcode this fixes), D-shim-frontdoor-on-groundloop-2026-07-02 (number leasing), [[project_class_vs_instance_addressee]].
